name: FortiGate Data Leak Protection
description: Detects attempts to exfiltrate sensitive data, as identified by FortiGate's Data Leak Prevention (DLP) features.

prompts.prompt: A Data Leak Prevention (DLP) violation has been detected by FortiGate, indicating an attempt to exfiltrate sensitive data. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Log ID** {log_id}, **User** {user}, **Source Address** {source_address}, **Destination Address** {destination_address}, **Source Country** {source_country}, **Destination Country** {destination_country}, **File Involved** {file}, **DLP Policy Violated** {policy}, **Severity** {severity}. Investigate this high-priority data exfiltration attempt immediately to prevent data loss and mitigate impact.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the DLP event.

parameters.name: log_id
parameters.description: The FortiGate Log ID for the DLP event.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user associated with the data exfiltration attempt.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address from which the data exfiltration was attempted.

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address to which the data exfiltration was attempted.

parameters.name: source_country
parameters.description: The country of origin for the source IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: destination_country
parameters.description: The country of the destination IP (enriched via GeoIP).

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The name of the file that triggered the DLP rule.

parameters.name: policy
parameters.description: The name or ID of the DLP policy that was violated.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: The severity level reported by FortiGate for the DLP event.
